name: mc_aiplayer
desc: Autonomous AI agent that plays Minecraft on its own — a server-side Fabric mod (MC 1.21.3) where a DeepSeek / OpenAI-compatible LLM drives a real player to min…
descFull: Autonomous AI agent that plays Minecraft on its own — a server-side Fabric mod (MC 1.21.3) where a DeepSeek / OpenAI-compatible LLM drives a real player to mine, build, farm, fight and survive from natural-language commands. LLM plans, deterministic tasks execute — no Python harness, no bot account.
